reviews.review_description:
Ong u got to try this , honestly better than monkey mischief 
It has SO many maps like mountains and beach as well as a hangout room and a shop with nice cosmetics. I played hide and seek with my friend it was the best hide and seek experience of my life hiding in different maps. It also has mini games like parkour and only up, highly recommend
very good, urp caary's game hard asf ngl

But the owner of the game needs to fix that  scream when you load in it’s so loud.
I had the jump scare of my life.

reviews.review_title: Great game to play with friends
reviews.review_description:
There's lots of maps cool holdables an secret rooms
🤫the community is really nice and my favorite map is hangout same as caves beach and water park there's infection and onlyup and they have daily updates
